# cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_storage_types (Data Source)

Used to retrieve all Public Cloud VM Instances storage types available to the tenant.

To query this datasource you will need the `public_cloud_vm_instances_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve all storage types available to the tenant.
data "cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_storage_types" "all" {}

output "available_storage_types" {
  value = [
    for st in data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_storage_types.all.storage_types :
    "${st.name} (${st.iops_hint})" if st.is_available
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `storage_types` (List of Object) The list of storage types. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--storage_types))

<a id="nestedatt--storage_types"></a>
### Nested Schema for `storage_types`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `iops_hint` (String)
- `is_available` (Boolean)
- `max_size_gb` (Number)
- `min_size_gb` (Number)
- `name` (String)
